subcodes.first_line: O firm servant of God! Even though clouds of tribulations repeatedly poured forth rains of afflictions, the field of suffering was spread, the ensemble of trial was readied
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده ثابت حق هر چند از غمام بلا باران جفا پی در پی رسید بساط محنت گسترده
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort
